creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleh Hushchenkov from comment #2)

Actually, it has not been common practice to enter 'Created by' for new ports for a few years now. For existing ports the entry is 'tolerated'. Therefore some maintainers remove their entry, others do not.

Personally, I have no problem with the entry being subsequently made in custom ports. So let's see, what happens ;)
